info.title: DevTeam CLI
info.description:
Commands (plain or slash-prefixed, for example `/init`):
start [--keep-awake true|false] [--workspace PATH]
init [--force] [--workspace PATH] [--goal TEXT | --goal-file PATH] [--mode SLUG] [--keep-awake true|false] [--total-credit-cap N] [--premium-credit-cap N] [--workspace-mcp true|false] [--pipeline-scheduling true|false]
customize [--force]                Copy default roles, modes, and superpowers to .devteam-source/ for editing
bug-report [--save PATH] [--redact-paths true|false] [--history-count N] [--error-count N] [--workspace PATH]
set-goal <TEXT> [--goal-file PATH] [--workspace PATH]
set-mode <SLUG> [--workspace PATH]
set-keep-awake <true|false> [--workspace PATH]
set-auto-approve <true|false> [--workspace PATH]
max-iterations <N> [--workspace PATH]    Set workspace default for max loop iterations
max-subagents <N> [--workspace PATH]     Set workspace default for max parallel subagents
add-roadmap <TITLE> [--detail TEXT] [--priority N] [--workspace PATH]
add-issue <TITLE> --role ROLE [--area AREA] [--detail TEXT] [--priority N] [--roadmap-item-id N] [--depends-on N [N...]] [--workspace PATH]
add-question <TEXT> [--blocking] [--workspace PATH]
answer-question <ID> <ANSWER> [--workspace PATH]
approve-plan [--note TEXT] [--workspace PATH]
feedback <TEXT> [--workspace PATH]
questions [--workspace PATH]
plan [--workspace PATH]
budget [--total N] [--premium N] [--workspace PATH]
check-update
update
run-once [--max-subagents N] [--workspace PATH]
run-loop [--backend sdk|cli] [--max-iterations N] [--max-subagents N] [--timeout-seconds N] [--verbosity quiet|normal|detailed] [--keep-awake true|false] [--workspace PATH]
complete-run --run-id N --outcome completed|failed|blocked --summary TEXT [--workspace PATH]
status [--workspace PATH]
agent-invoke [--backend sdk|cli] [--prompt TEXT] [--model NAME] [--timeout-seconds N] [--working-directory PATH] [--extra-arg ARG ...]
workspace-mcp --workspace PATH
